compiled_state.title: test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh: harvest-worktree.sh contains relative path refs -> test fails in full suite
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh fails in the full test suite with exit code 1.

## Actual Behavior
test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh fails because harvest-worktree.sh contains relative path references that violate the no-relative-paths policy.

## Expected Behavior
All plugin scripts should use absolute paths (via _PLUGIN_ROOT or _PLUGIN_GIT_PATH). harvest-worktree.sh should be updated to use absolute paths.

## Reproduction
bash tests/run-all.sh (pre-existing failure — unrelated to staged changes, confirmed by test gate)

## Context
Observed during sprint worktree-20260412-173956. Prior closed ticket 0fc6-c970 addressed a related harvest-worktree.sh issue but this failure persists.

comments.body: Investigation 2026-04-13: bash tests/scripts/test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh now passes (PASSED: 2, FAILED: 0). The failure described in the ticket appears to have been resolved by prior commits. No code change needed. Suggest closing.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Verification 2026-04-15: bash tests/scripts/test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh reports PASSED: 2 FAILED: 0. Bug resolved by prior commit c4e67803 (fix harvest-worktree paths). No code change needed.
comments.author: Test
